name: Tomato Salad with Fresh Mozzarella

ingredients.item: very ripe tomatoes, sliced ¼-inch thick
fresh mozzarella cheese, sliced ¼-inch thick
Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Arrange tomato and mozzarella slices on a serving platter by alternating layers with basil leaves.
Drizzle each layer with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, and freshly ground pepper.
